page: Microsoft Azure NV12ads_A10_v5 is a virtual machine instance from the NVADSA10v5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. This server features an x86_64 AMD processor with 12 dedicated vCPUs and 110.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 9.17 GB of RAM per core. The hardware configuration includes a fractional GPU allocation consisting of one-third of an NVIDIA A10 GPU with 7 GB of dedicated VRAM.

For local storage, the instance is equipped with a 369 GB local disk and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk attachments. The fractional GPU architecture provides a qualitative cost-efficiency advantage for workloads that require GPU acceleration but do not need a full, dedicated GPU card, thereby reducing resource waste and optimizing cost relative to the hardware profile.

Given the combination of 12 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 110.0 GB of RAM, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU, this instance is designed for workloads such as entry-level deep learning inference, virtual desktop infrastructure, lightweight 3D rendering, and graphics-accelerated applications that benefit from moderate GPU resources and high memory capacity.
description: The Microsoft Azure NV12ads_A10_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the NVADSA10v5 family, powered by an AMD processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated vCPUs and 110.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 9.17 GB per vCPU. The instance is equipped with a fractional GPU allocation of 0.3333 of an NVIDIA A10 GPU with 7 GB of VRAM, alongside 369 GB of local storage. This configuration is Premium Storage capable, offering flexible storage options. By partitioning the GPU, the server delivers a cost-efficient hardware profile for workloads that require hardware acceleration without the overhead of a full GPU. It is suited for virtual desktop infrastructure, moderate graphics rendering, and machine learning inference tasks.

tagline: An x86_64 virtual machine featuring fractional GPU acceleration, dedicated AMD processors, and high memory capacity for graphics-intensive workloads.

Equipped with 110.0 GB of RAM providing 9.17 GB per core
Includes a fractional 0.3333 NVIDIA A10 GPU with 7 GB VRAM
